title: Ubiquiti UACC-Flex-Utility-Pro - Universal Outdoor Enclosure
description: A universal outdoor weatherproof enclosure with IPX6 protection rating . Protect your networking gear in any environment with this versatile, durable enclosure, designed for both wall and pole mounting . The enclosure features ample internal space to house a power adapter or PoE injector USW-Flex-2.5G-5 USW-Ultra USW-Flex-2.5G-8 USW-Ultra-60W USW-Flex-2.5G-8-PoE USW-Ultra-210W USW-Flex
